title: Build Something Real
knowledge_note: The greatest scholars completed their work and shared it. Ibn Sina's Canon of Medicine took decades. Your program, completed and working, is your gift to the world.
explanation: Now bring everything together — blueprints, bags, loops, recipes, and modules — to build a complete program.
starter_code:
use finance

blueprint Student:
    create(name):
        me.name = name
        me.grades = bag[]
    recipe add_grade(score):
        me.grades.add(score)
    recipe average():
        if me.grades.size is 0:
            give back 0
        remember total = 0
        for each g in me.grades:
            total = total + g
        give back total / me.grades.size
    recipe report():
        say me.name + " — average: " + me.average()

remember s = Student("Amira")
s.add_grade(92)
s.add_grade(85)
s.add_grade(97)
s.report()
worked_example:
use finance

blueprint Student:
    create(name):
        me.name = name
        me.grades = bag[]
    recipe add_grade(score):
        me.grades.add(score)
    recipe average():
        if me.grades.size is 0:
            give back 0
        remember total = 0
        for each g in me.grades:
            total = total + g
        give back total / me.grades.size
    recipe report():
        say me.name + " — average: " + me.average()

remember s = Student("Amira")
s.add_grade(92)
s.add_grade(85)
s.add_grade(97)
s.report()
challenge: Add yourself as a student with your own grades.
hint: Create remember me = Student("(your name)") and call add_grade() a few times.
